title: Extract Time Tracker Time Stamps
excerpt: Is it possible to extract the time tracker timestamps and show them in a dashboard?

posts.author: Charlie_F (Charlie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to extract the time tracker timestamps and show them in a dashboard?

image438×428 29.3 KB

image438×428 29.3 KB

posts.author: Mariia (Mariia Mykhasiuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Charlie_F !
The native Time Tracking column in monday is helpful, but it doesn’t easily let you extract detailed timestamps or display them in a dashboard format.

You might want to try our Time in Status for monday.com app. It provides advanced time reports showing exactly how long items spend in each status or stage, and you can visualize those results directly on dashboards or export them for deeper analysis. It’s a great way to turn raw time tracking data into actionable insights.

posts.author: Mariia (Mariia Mykhasiuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jdutt if you’re looking for a way to see total tracked time across multiple boards or per user, you might want to try our Time in Status for monday.com.
It lets you generate time reports from different boards, view total hours per person, and filter by week or month — all in one place. It’s super helpful for billing, productivity, and team planning.
